dependencies: Wide variety of raw materials, primarily metals and semi-processed or finished components
Commodity pricing volatility for steel, copper, aluminum and select other commodities
Some raw materials and components available only from limited or single source suppliers
risks: Supply chain constraints and labor shortages could result in production stoppages, inflation in material input costs and freight logistics
Significant price increases for certain commodities, other raw materials or components could adversely affect operating profits

Disruption of global supply chain for issues such as COVID-19 or other health epidemics or pandemics, labor disputes, loss of single source or limited source supplier, inability to procure sufficient raw materials, quality control issues, ethical sourcing issues, discontinuity or disruption in internal information and data systems or those of suppliers, cybersecurity incidents including ransomware attacks, misuse of artificial intelligence and machine learning technologies, supplier's financial distress, natural disasters, looting, vandalism or acts of war or terrorism, trade sanctions or other external factors

regulatory_risks: Compliance with wide variety of laws, regulations and policies including environmental, employment and health and safety regulations, data security laws, data privacy laws, export/import laws, tax policies, sustainability regulations, energy efficiency and design regulations
Failure to comply could result in civil and criminal, monetary and non-monetary penalties as well as potential damage to reputation and disruption to business
Changes in statutory tax rates and unanticipated outcomes with respect to tax audits
Increased compliance costs, including costs associated with disclosure requirements and related due diligence
Government import and export controls, economic sanctions, embargoes or trade restrictions
Imposition of duties and tariffs and other trade barriers and retaliatory countermeasures
Changes in law, including the effect of tax laws and developments with respect to trade policy and tariffs
Increasing government efforts, domestically and internationally, pertaining to mandatory sustainability reporting
Climate change related policies and regulations

sanction_risks: Government import and export controls, economic sanctions, embargoes or trade restrictions
Trade sanctions or other external factors over which company has no control could interrupt product supply
